title: Tale Of 2 Cities
text: U.S. equity markets extended their rebound this week as a strong slate of earnings reports clashed with renewed concerns over financial instability and economic data that provided fodder for both bulls and bears. Closing at its highest levels since early February, the S&P 500 advanced 0.9%, but gains were skewed towards larger companies. The Mid-Cap 400 slipped 0.3%, and the Small-Cap 600 declined 1.0%.

title: Essex Property (ESS) Beats Q1 FFO Estimates, Raises '23 View
text: Essex Property's (ESS) Q1 results reflect favorable same-property revenues. Also, the company raises its 2023 core FFO guidance midpoint.

title: Essex Property Trust (ESS) Q1 Earnings: How Key Metrics Compare to Wall Street Estimates
text: The headline numbers for Essex Property Trust (ESS) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended March 2023, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: Essex Property Trust (ESS) Q1 FFO Top Estimates
text: Essex Property Trust (ESS) came out with quarterly funds from operations (FFO) of $3.65 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $3.62 per share. This compares to FFO of $3.37 per share a year ago.

title: Essex Announces First Quarter 2023 Results and Increases Full-Year 2023 Guidance
text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE: ESS) (the “Company”) announced today its first quarter 2023 earnings results and related business activities. Net Income, Funds from Operations (“FFO”), and Core FFO per diluted share for the quarter ended March 31, 2023 are detailed below.   Three Months Ended March 31,     %   2023 2022 Change Per Diluted Share       Net Income $2.38 $1.12 112.5% Total FFO $3.80 $3.36 13.1% Core FFO $3.65 $3.37 8.3%         First Quarter 20.

title: What's in Store for Essex Property (ESS) in Q1 Earnings?
text: While Essex Property's (ESS) Q1 results are likely to show the benefits of a solid property base and technological initiatives, elevated supply and higher interest expenses might have limited the growth tempo.

title: These Dividend Stocks Think Their Shares Are Extremely Undervalued
text: Many REITs opportunistically repurchased shares at a discount to their net asset value. Those buybacks could help boost their values in the future.

title: Billionaire Investor Says 'Buy REITs'
text: Billionaire Barry Sternlicht is buying REITs. He explains that there are "unbelievable bargains" in REITs.

title: Here's Why You Should Retain Essex Property (ESS) Stock for Now
text: Essex Property (ESS) is well-poised to benefit from the favorable West Coast market fundamentals and a solid balance sheet. However, the lack of rent relief and interest rate hikes are worrisome.

title: Essex Property Trust: The Best Time To Buy Apartment REITs Since 2008
text: Apartment REITs have traded sharply lower due to the rising interest rate environment. Valuations for many are as attractive as they ever have been since the Great Financial Crisis.

title: 4 Dividend Aristocrat Buys For April + 2 To Watch
text: "Dividend Aristocrats in the S&P 500 Index have raised their annual payouts every year for at least 25 consecutive years." - Kiplinger.com/Investing. 67 Aristocrats, screened as of April 5, 2023, represented all eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker estimated top ten net gains ranged from 14.14%-42.97% topped by SWK & VFC.

title: 3 High-Yield REITs to Buy Now
text: Income investors looking for high-yield stocks with safe dividends should take a closer look at real estate investment trusts (REITs). The appeal of REITs is that they provide investors with the opportunity to profit from real estate, without the need to own property.

title: Essex Announces Release and Conference Call Dates for Its First Quarter 2023 Earnings
text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE:ESS) announced today that it plans to release its first quarter 2023 earnings after the market closes on Thursday, April 27, 2023. A conference call with senior management is scheduled for Friday, April 28, 2023 at 10:00 a.m. Pacific Time or 1:00 p.m. Eastern Time. The first quarter conference call is open to everyone and can be accessed by: Internet: Go to www.essex.

title: Confounded's Complete All-Weather Portfolio Revealed
text: Most readers follow my work for the extensive writing I have done referencing my aggressive growth portfolio. However, the vast majority of my net worth is held in my all-weather portfolio. In this article, I would like to draw back the curtain on my main, all-weather portfolio, where roughly 80% of my assets reside.
